query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT establishmentId) FROM menu_items) as com_cardapio,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments) as total_establishments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT establishmentId FROM menu_items)) as sem_cardapio;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT establishmentId) FROM menu_items) as com_cardapio,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments) as total_establishments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM establishments WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT establishmentId FROM menu_items)) as sem_cardapio;
